# Yacht Away Now

## About
Yacht Away Now is a luxury private yacht charter company based in St. Petersburg, Florida. We operate a 62ft Princess Flybridge yacht offering sunset cruises, day charters, bachelorette parties, birthday celebrations, and multi-day Bahamas adventures on Florida's Gulf Coast.

## Key Facts
- Location: St. Petersburg, FL (Tampa Bay area)
- Vessel: 62ft Princess Flybridge
- Capacity: Up to 13 guests
- Range: 600 miles (Bahamas capable)
- Decks: 3 levels of luxury
- Engine: 800hp, 30+ knot speed
- Cabin: 1,200 sq ft interior
- Outdoor: 800+ sq ft deck space

## Services
- Sunset Cruises (4-5 hours)
- Day Charters (4+ hours)
- Bachelorette Parties
- Birthday Celebrations
- Overnight Charters
- Multi-Day Bahamas & Florida Keys Trips

## Pricing
- Hourly: $400/hr (4-hour minimum, +$50/hr fuel, +$100/hr captain)
- Weekend 4-hr: $2,000 (11am-2pm)
- Weekend 5-hr: $2,500 (2:30pm-7:30pm)
- Overnight/Bahamas: Starting at $5,000+

## Contact
- Phone: (727) 609-2248
- Email: josh@yachtawaynow.com
- Address: 38th Way S, St. Petersburg, FL
- Website: https://www.yachtawaynow.com

## Team
- Josh Wilson: Founder & Owner
- Captain Jason: Licensed Captain
- Professional hospitality crew

## Reviews
- 47 verified Google reviews
- 5.0 star average rating

## Service Areas
St. Petersburg, Tampa Bay, Clearwater, Gulf Coast Florida, Florida Keys, Bahamas
